Trade enquiry
Est. in the Alps · Direct trade · Since 2019

Swiss wine,
by the case,
with the people
who grow it.

We import natural and biodynamic wine from small Swiss growers into the Baltics and the United Kingdom — for restaurants, wine bars, and bottle shops who care where it came from.

See the growersRequest the trade list

Direct trade
Vendange•Naturel•Biodinamica•Cantina•Mise en bouteille•Cuvée•Lieu-dit•Sans soufre•Macération•Foudre•Chasselas•Petite Arvine•Cornalin•Humagne•Vendange•Naturel•Biodinamica•Cantina•Mise en bouteille•Cuvée•Lieu-dit•Sans soufre•Macération•Foudre•Chasselas•Petite Arvine•Cornalin•Humagne•
§ Manifesto

We sell wine that tastes of somewhere — and of someone.

01Tenet

Naturel & biodinamica

Every grower in our book farms organically at minimum. Most are certified Demeter or Bio Suisse. In the cellar: native yeast, no additions, minimal or zero sulphur — the way wine has been made for most of its history.

02Tenet

Direct from the cellar

We work in single-domaine pallets, never through middlemen. You get traceability back to the parcel, fair pricing for the grower, and stories you can tell on the floor of your restaurant.

03Tenet

Baltics & the UK

Bonded warehouses in Riga, Tallinn, Vilnius and London. EUR or GBP invoicing. Tax and customs handled. Delivery in seven to ten days from order confirmation.

§ The growers

Six houses, five regions, one philosophy.

Visited at harvest, tasted barrel by barrel, chosen for what they refuse to do as much as for what they put in the bottle.

01 / VS
Biodinamica

Domaine de Fully

Fully — Valais

Granite-driven whites on the steep terraces above the Rhône. Horse-ploughed, hand-picked, fermented with native yeast.

Hectares
6.5
Since
2008
Cert.
Demeter
↳ Petite Arvine
02 / VD
Vin naturel

Cave de Lavaux

Epesses — Vaud

Six generations on UNESCO terraces above Lac Léman. Skin-contact Chasselas and zero-sulphur reds aged in old foudres.

Hectares
4.2
Since
2014
Cert.
—
↳ Chasselas
03 / GE
Bio organic

Coteaux de Satigny

Satigny — Genève

Family domaine in Switzerland's largest wine commune. Field blends, long élevage, no fining or filtration.

Hectares
8
Since
1998
Cert.
Bio Suisse
↳ Gamaret
04 / TI
Biodinamica

Tenuta Mendrisio

Mendrisio — Ticino

South-facing slopes a stone's throw from Italy. Whole-cluster Merlot in concrete egg, plus an unusual orange Sauvignon.

Hectares
5.1
Since
2011
Cert.
Demeter
↳ Merlot del Ticino
05 / NE
Vin naturel

Maison du Lac

Auvernier — Three Lakes

Limestone Pinot from the shores of Lake Neuchâtel. Whole-bunch ferments, neutral oak, bottled by gravity.

Hectares
3.8
Since
2017
Cert.
—
↳ Pinot Noir
06 / GR
Biodinamica

Weingut Bündner

Malans — Graubünden

Alpine Pinot and the rare native Completer grape, farmed at 600m. Long, cold ferments and a deep love of Riesling-Sylvaner.

Hectares
4.5
Since
2005
Cert.
Demeter
↳ Completer
§ Cartography

From the Rhône to the Rhine.

A small country with an outsized variety of soils, altitudes and grapes. Click a marker to read about the grower.

Map preview
Add your Google Maps API key to .env.local
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY and the map will render with all six producers as markers.
Producer
6 estates · 5 cantons · 38ha total
§ Get in touch

Make wine, or pour it.
Either way — let's talk.
